original_text: Political uncertainty surrounding trade and other international disputes could also have a negative effect on consumer confidence and spending, which could adversely affect the Company's business.
modified_text: Political uncertainty surrounding trade and other international disputes is reducing consumer confidence and spending and is adversely affecting Apple's business.
claim: Political uncertainty around trade disputes is reducing consumer confidence and spending and is adversely affecting Apple's business.
notes: Source frames this as a forward-looking RISK ('could ... have a negative effect', 'could adversely affect'). Report strips the hedge and asserts it as a present, actual effect. Core topic is backed but the conditional/possibility caveat is removed -> partially_supported.
